steps.action: Run pytest on test_streaming.py with verbose output
steps.expected: All TestStreamFilter and TestRunFilterPipelineWithDataset tests pass
steps.observed: All 8 TestStreamFilter tests and 6 TestRunFilterPipelineWithDataset tests passed

steps.action: Verify test_processes_all_chunks_no_drops: pipeline processes all 10 chunks from mock dataset
steps.observed: PASSED - assert len(results) == 10, each result has correct chunk text and pass/fail boolean

steps.action: Verify test_yields_pass_fail_for_every_chunk: every chunk gets a boolean pass/fail
steps.expected: 3 results, each with passed is True or False
steps.observed: PASSED - all 3 results have boolean passed field

steps.action: Verify test_pass_rate_with_mixed_chunks: correct pass/fail counts with mixed data
Verify test_filtering_correctness_with_patch: high activation chunks are filtered
steps.expected: First chunk passes (low activation), second chunk fails (high activation)
steps.observed: PASSED - results[0].passed is True, results[1].passed is False

steps.action: Verify edge cases: empty text, missing text key, max_chunks, empty feature indices
steps.observed: PASSED - test_empty_text_chunk_passes, test_chunk_without_text_key, test_max_chunks_limits_processing, test_empty_feature_indices_all_pass all passed

assertions.title: Filtered dataset pushes to HF Hub

steps.action: Verify test_upload_called_for_passing_chunks: mock upload is called with correct params
steps.expected: upload_to_hub called with repo_id='user/test-repo', repo_type='dataset', private=True
steps.observed: PASSED - mock_upload.called is True, call_args contain correct repo_id, repo_type, and private params

steps.action: Verify test_no_upload_when_no_repo_specified: no upload when hf_repo_id is None
Verify test_no_upload_when_all_chunks_filtered: no upload when all chunks fail
steps.observed: PASSED - mock_upload not called, stats.passed == 0, stats.failed == 2

assertions.title: No large files in git from data pipeline

steps.action: Verify test_no_safetensors_in_repo: git ls-files shows no .safetensors files
Verify test_no_gguf_in_repo: git ls-files shows no .gguf files

steps.observed: PASSED - both patterns found in .gitignore content

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-DATA-005 (streaming pipeline processes all chunks) verified with 11 tests covering normal operation, edge cases, and mixed pass/fail scenarios. VAL-DATA-006 (HF Hub upload) verified with 3 tests confirming correct upload calls and proper skip conditions. VAL-DATA-007 (no large files in git) verified with 3 tests confirming no tracked safetensors/gguf files and .gitignore patterns. Total: 28 tests collected, 28 passed in 1.76s.
